subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-19
subcodes.first_line: For the present it is better to keep all the documents in the safety deposit vault... We will see what God wants. If America becomes illumined, its illumination like a magnet, will draw me there... The Turks are fond of eating.
subcodes.subjects: @bribery and corruption, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
